title: Cato's HD Textures 64x
description: A texture pack that aims to texture all Minecraft blocks to a realistic but vanilla-friendly style
body:
# Cato's HD textures

## **A texture pack focused on the details of small objects, aiming to look vanilla from a distance, but realistic up close. With PBR compatibility**

**_This texture pack is a Beta**

**Patreon for 128x (With PBR), 256x, 512x, AND 1024x textures:**
**[Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/Cato_el_mas_guapo)**

Currently has 100+ blocks, but expect more soon.

![A forest with an acacia log](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dee75830f7671dd021946a75a2956e0b035d18c.jpeg)

![The Stone in a Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/178649c2db940f094bb1620203fadbb178fc4f73.jpeg)

![Planks :D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f629e80d451a83fa363f4fbdd95597f5dd6034f2.jpeg)

![Cobblestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/132dd36db3bcc892ecb5a95d337c5b10b24706b0.jpeg)

_Warning: The base textures were generated with the help of artificial intelligence tool, but they were polished, modified, and integrated manually, as was LabPBR compatibility._

**List of currently added blocks:**

cherry planks
